summary: Modification Proposals Flow VERIFIED. Backend APIs and Frontend UI for contractual appointment modifications are working correctly. Organizer and participant can create proposals, all parties must accept (unanimity), rejection immediately rejects, unanimous acceptance applies changes to appointment.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/modifications/active/{appointment_id} returns active proposal or null (PASSED)
Backend: POST /api/modifications/ creates proposal (organizer via JWT) (PASSED)
Backend: POST /api/modifications/ creates proposal (participant via invitation_token) (PASSED)
Backend: Duplicate proposal on same appointment returns 400 (PASSED)
Backend: Proposal with past start_datetime returns 400 (PASSED)
Backend: POST /api/modifications/{id}/respond with 'reject' immediately rejects proposal (PASSED)
Backend: Unanimous acceptance applies changes to the appointment (PASSED)
Backend: Rejection does NOT change the appointment (PASSED)
Frontend Organizer: Pencil icon (edit-datetime-btn) visible to propose modification (PASSED)
Frontend Organizer: Proposal form opens with date, duration, type, location fields (PASSED)
Frontend Organizer: Active proposal banner shows changes (old vs new) and response tracking (PASSED)
Frontend Organizer: Can accept/reject participant proposals (PASSED)
Frontend Participant: 'Proposer une modification' link visible (PASSED)
Frontend Participant: Proposal form opens with datetime, duration, location fields (PASSED)
Frontend Participant: Active proposal banner shows accept/reject buttons (PASSED)
Frontend Participant: Can accept/reject organizer proposals (PASSED)
Frontend: Proposal history toggle shows modification history (PASSED)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend modification_service.py: Correctly implements unanimity logic - all responses must be 'accepted' for proposal to be applied
Backend modification_service.py: Rejection immediately sets proposal status to 'rejected' without applying changes
Backend modification_routes.py: Properly handles both JWT auth (organizer) and invitation_token auth (participant)
Frontend AppointmentDetail.js: Pencil icon hidden when activeProposal exists (canEditDatetime check)
Frontend AppointmentDetail.js: Active proposal banner shows old vs new values with strikethrough styling
Frontend InvitationPage.js: Participant can propose modifications when no active proposal exists
Frontend InvitationPage.js: Accept/reject buttons only shown when participant has pending response

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 passed, 2 skipped due to participant not in proposal responses)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test appointment and participant
context_for_next_testing_agent: Modification proposals flow fully verified. Test appointment fbca6bbc has 9 proposals in history. Current location: 'Bordeaux, Place de la Bourse'. Participant Alice Dupont (modif_test@test.com) has status 'accepted_pending_guarantee'. data-testid keys: edit-datetime-btn (pencil icon), proposal-form, submit-proposal-btn, active-proposal-banner, participant-proposal-banner, participant-propose-btn, accept-proposal-btn, reject-proposal-btn, toggle-proposal-history, organizer-respond-proposal.

verified_features.organizer_create_proposal: POST /api/modifications/ with JWT creates proposal, organizer_response auto_accepted
verified_features.participant_create_proposal: POST /api/modifications/ with invitation_token creates proposal, organizer must respond
verified_features.duplicate_proposal_blocked: 400 error when active proposal exists for same appointment
verified_features.past_date_validation: 400 error when proposed start_datetime is in the past
verified_features.reject_response: POST /api/modifications/{id}/respond with action='reject' immediately rejects proposal
verified_features.unanimous_acceptance: When all parties accept, changes are applied to appointment
verified_features.rejection_preserves_state: When any party rejects, appointment is NOT modified
verified_features.frontend_organizer_pencil: Pencil icon visible next to datetime, opens proposal form
verified_features.frontend_organizer_form: Form has datetime, duration, type, location fields
verified_features.frontend_organizer_banner: Shows changes (old vs new), response tracking, cancel button
verified_features.frontend_participant_link: 'Proposer une modification' link visible when no active proposal
verified_features.frontend_participant_form: Form has datetime, duration, location fields
verified_features.frontend_participant_banner: Shows changes, accept/reject buttons when pending response
verified_features.frontend_history_toggle: Shows proposal history count and details
